title: UNDERCAST source ledger row
description: One provenance row from data/SOURCES.json — a parallel ledger keyed 1:1 to data/specimens.json by id, recording where each specimen's images came from and when they were fetched. Shape inferred from the 1067 live rows.

id.description: Catalog number, matching the corresponding specimen (optional 'G' marks a model-grown card).

still.description: Provenance for the front still. Always present as a key; null when there is no still.

portrait.description: Provenance for the back portrait. Always present as a key; null when there is no portrait.

fetched_at.description: Date the images were last fetched.

image.description: Identical shape to the still/portrait objects in specimens.json.

src.description: Image path, relative to the site root. Not a URL.

kind.description: still.kind is always "still"; portrait.kind is "copyright" or "free". "generated" is reserved.

author.description: Optional. May be an empty string.

license.description: Optional. May be an empty string.

pin.description: Optional. Only ever true in the current data.

focus.description: Optional curated crop focus mirrored from the canonical specimen image.

comparison.description: Optional human-reviewed Recognition Loop alignment mirrored from the canonical specimen image.

year.description: Optional. Year the photograph was taken, when known. Mirrors specimens.json.
